title: Scp Objects
description: Adding several scp objects to your game!
body:
Immerse yourself in the mysterious world of the _SCP Foundation_ with the **SCP OBJECTS** mod! This mod adds various anomalous objects, including **SCP-500**, a miraculous pill capable of healing diseases, and **SCP-330**, a mysterious bowl of candy that punishes greed, and the newly added **SCP-294**, the enigmatic "Coffee Machine" with reality-defying capabilities, and **SCP-207**, a seemingly ordinary bottle of cola with extraordinary effects.

Explore and experiment with new SCPs, revealing their secret properties and potential. Each object has unique mechanics close to the SCP Foundation canon:

**SCP-500** can be used for instant healing, but it is limited in number.

**SCP-330** offers the player a choice of candies, but if you take more than two, the consequences can be fatal!

**SCP-294** allows players to input the name of a drink and receive a corresponding liquid. Some drinks provide beneficial effects, while others may be hazardous—or even completely unpredictable!

**SCP-207** grants players enhanced speed and stamina after consumption, but prolonged use leads to gradual health deterioration—use wisely!

**SCP-207?** is the opposite effect of **SCP-207**. It reduces movement and reaction speed, but restores health, making the player more stable.

The mod supports **_Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge_** and will be updated regularly, adding new objects and mechanics from the SCP universe. _Are you ready to plunge into the world of dangerous anomalies and conduct your experiments?_
